songs.title: The Rock Show
songs.album: Take Off Your Pants and Jacket
feed: “The Rock Show” by blink-182 spends a 3rd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 36 sales units.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 230,748 total units.
